wizard.select_zone_title: Which area do you want to treat?
wizard.select_zone_subtitle: Select a category to view treatments
wizard.secure_data: Your data is secure and encrypted
wizard.deposit_policy_desc: To guarantee your appointment's availability and maintain our service's excellence, we request a secure deposit.
wizard.need_to_cancel_title: Need to cancel or change your appointment?
wizard.need_to_cancel_desc: You can do so free of charge up to **{hours} hours** in advance and your deposit will be fully refunded.
wizard.closed_dialog_msg: Sorry, we are closed on this day.
wizard.medical_alerts_placeholder: Please indicate any medical conditions or allergies here...
wizard.notes_placeholder: Write any observations or special details here...
wizard.popup_deposit_title: Why do we charge a deposit?
wizard.popup_deposit_desc: We charge a security deposit to lock your appointment slot and prevent last-minute cancellations. This amount will be fully deducted from the total treatment price on the day of your clinic visit.
wizard.success_subtitle: Your reservation has been completed successfully. Merce is waiting for you.
wizard.success_desc: We have sent you a confirmation link. Please confirm it within the next 30 minutes to secure your slot.
wizard.success_loading_desc: We are synchronizing your confirmation with our agenda...
wizard.client_email_desc: We have sent the confirmation and receipt to

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the identity and operations of your clinic.

absences.add_desc: Block calendar for holidays or vacation.

calendar.working_days_desc: Select the days when the clinic will be open.
calendar.margin_hours_desc: Determines the minimum time before an appointment for a client to book online on the same day.

payments.stripe_desc: Configure your Stripe account to process online payments and deposits. 100% of earnings go directly to your connected bank account.
payments.not_connected: You haven't connected your account yet
payments.onboarding_desc: To start charging deposits for online bookings, you must complete the secure onboarding process with Stripe.
payments.stripe_needed_info: Stripe needs more information to enable payouts. Click manage to complete your profile.
payments.slot_blocking_desc: The system automatically blocks time slots for 10 minutes when a client starts the deposit checkout process. If not completed, the slot is released.
payments.cancellation_margin_desc: Hours of advance notice required for cancellations.
payments.deposit_policies_desc: You can configure which treatments require a deposit and their exact individual amount in the Service Editor.
payments.global_deposit_desc: Applies a default deposit charge to all active treatments in the clinic.
payments.global_deposit_note: * Note: If a treatment has an individual deposit configured in its details, that value overrides the global deposit. To exempt a service, set it to €0 in its editor.

toasts.sync_incomplete: Account synced. Stripe still requires more profile details.
toasts.disconnect_msg: Are you sure you want to disconnect Stripe? Online payments and deposits will stop working immediately.

branding.title: App Visual Identity
branding.logo_desc: This is the icon you will see in the main navigation sidebar.
branding.themes_desc: Coming soon: customize the primary color and typography of your entire dashboard.

booking_ui.title: Booking Layout
booking_ui.layout_desc: Choose how your treatments are displayed during the first step of mobile booking.
booking_ui.grid_desc: Luxury catalog-style layout. Ideal for clinics with highly visual treatments or a curated menu.
booking_ui.list_desc: Clean and ultra-clear view. The best choice if you have a wide range of services.
